title: Require Artifact File Shape
forbids: artifact owner files without the stable artifact contract export shape
why: Artifact owner files are the reusable contract surface for immutable MapGen data products; every artifact file must expose the same stable owner API, including publish-time validation, rather than instance-specific validation or artifact aliases.
remediate: Use one artifact owner per artifacts/*.artifact.ts file with exported Schema, exported artifact = defineArtifact(...), exported validate(...), generic assert names only when justified, and no semantic artifact alias exports.
message: Artifact files must use the stable artifact contract file shape.
